movers.author: pskoett
movers.script: An agent fails. It fails again. Self-Improving-Agent logs the error, what worked, what didn't, then writes corrections back into its own system prompt. Each failure tightens the next iteration without human intervention.

movers.author: steipete
movers.script: Your Gmail inbox sits in a browser tab you'll never close. Gog pipes Google Workspace into your terminal—Gmail search, Calendar queries, Drive file ops, Sheets editing via CLI flags. No web UI required.

movers.author: steipete
movers.script: You've got a 47-page PDF open and a YouTube video queued up, but you need the core facts in ninety seconds. Summarize ingests URLs or local files—PDFs, images, audio, YouTube videos—and returns condensed text via CLI, parsing media types automatically without browser overhead.

movers.author: steipete
movers.script: Your CI pipeline fails at 2 AM and you're reading GitHub in a browser like it's 2010. This skill wires the `gh` CLI directly into agent workflows—`gh run` polls CI status, `gh api` queries raw repository data, `gh issue` and `gh pr` automate triage and merge decisions without touching a GUI.

movers.author: JimLiuxinghai
movers.script: User asks "is there a skill for that" and gets ignored. Find Skills listens for capability gaps, queries the skill registry via CLI, and surfaces install commands for matching tools—or admits none exist and pivots to workarounds.

movers.author: arun-8687
movers.script: Your agent asks a question. Tavily returns five ranked results instead of thirty spam links. It hits the Tavily API, filters for relevance, extracts raw content from URLs, and runs deep search mode when you toggle it on.

movers.author: TheSethRose
movers.script: Your AI agent stares at a login form and has no idea which field is the username. Agent Browser executes click, type, and screenshot commands via Rust CLI with Node.js fallback, parsing semantic locators to navigate pages the way humans do.

movers.author: steipete
movers.script: Most weather APIs want your API key. This one doesn't. Weather agent fetches current conditions and five-day forecasts via open.meteo.com, parses JSON responses, and serves data without authentication overhead or rate limits.

movers.author: halthelobster
movers.script: Most AI agents sit waiting for instructions. Proactive Agent runs unsupervised with WAL Protocol for state recovery, Working Buffer for context persistence, and Autonomous Crons that execute tasks without prompts — then self-audits implementation against actual outcomes.

movers.author: steipete
movers.script: Your Sonos speakers sit there doing nothing while you dig through the app. Sonoscli discovers every speaker on your network and controls playback, volume, and grouping from the CLI—sonos-cli play, sonos-cli volume 50, sonos-cli group—no app required.

rockets.author: JK-0001
rockets.script: You're copying the same task between three apps every morning. Automation Workflows maps your repetitive processes, then chains Zapier, Make, or n8n together to execute them — triggers fire on schedule or webhook, actions execute across your entire stack without touching anything twice.

rockets.author: guogang1024
rockets.script: You've got hundreds of conversations buried in append-only JSONL files and no way to find them. Session-logs pipes your chat history through jq and ripgrep to extract messages by keyword, calculate token spend per conversation, and map which tools you actually used across sessions.

rockets.author: joelchance
rockets.script: You have two thousand dollars on whether Trump wins Pennsylvania, and the odds just shifted three points in two hours. Polymarket queries live prediction market data, surfaces trending events, and triggers watchlist alerts when odds cross your threshold.

rockets.author: matagul
rockets.script: You're three clicks away from automating your entire desktop. OpenClaw's Desktop Control executes mouse movement, keyboard input, and hotkey sequences, then validates results via screen capture and pixel color detection—all with failsafe abort and approval mode built in.

rockets.author: NextFrontierBuilds
rockets.script: Your Claude conversation from three months ago is gone. Elite Longterm Memory persists agent context across sessions using WAL-backed vector search and git-notes storage, syncing across Cursor, ChatGPT, and Copilot with encrypted cloud backup.
